title: PointsExpiringSoon
description: Wire contract for advance point-expiry warnings on the member-events exchange (routing key points.expiring). Producer: services/members (transactional outbox, ADR-0024) — emitted once per earn lot when it enters the warning horizon. Consumer: services/notifications. Carries no PII.

eventId.description: Deterministic dedup key (also the outbox document id): expiring-{earnLedgerEntryId} — one warning per lot, ever.

memberId.description: Osprey member whose points are about to expire.

points.description: Unconsumed points of the lot that will expire.

expiresAtUtc.description: ISO-8601 instant when the lot expires (earn date + 24 months).

occurredAtUtc.description: ISO-8601 instant the warning was produced.

correlationId.description: Optional trailing field (ADR-0002 additive convention). Sweep-originated events omit it.
